title: Gateway API Helm chart values
description: Editor-oriented schema for Gateway API Helm chart values. Gateways and xRoutes are configured as lists.

naming.title: Naming tags
naming.description: Common tags for generating resource names by the convention {instanceTag}-{clusterTag}-{kindShort}-{projectTag}-{name}.

generic.title: Generic settings
generic.description: Common labels/annotations applied to all chart resources.

authorizationPolicy.title: AuthorizationPolicy
authorizationPolicy.description: Settings for generating an Istio AuthorizationPolicy for the Gateway workload.

networkPolicy.title: NetworkPolicy
networkPolicy.description: Settings for generating a Kubernetes NetworkPolicy for the Gateway workload.

gateways.title: Gateways
gateways.description: List of Gateway resources. Each list element creates a separate Gateway and an associated ConfigMap.

xroutes.title: xRoutes
xroutes.description: List of Route resources: HTTPRoute, GRPCRoute, TLSRoute, TCPRoute or UDPRoute. apiVersion is not set in values and is selected by the template based on kind. May be empty: a Gateway can be deployed without routes.

oidcAuth.title: OIDC Auth
oidcAuth.description: OIDC authentication settings via oauth2-proxy, Keycloak and Istio AuthorizationPolicy.

tlsWildcards.title: TLS wildcards
tlsWildcards.description: Platform-predefined wildcard TLS certificates for *.idp.ecpk.test / *.edp.ecpk.test (filled by the platform/ops, not the user). Hidden.

global.title: Global values
global.description: Helm global values, injected automatically when the chart is used as a subchart. Not used by the chart templates.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Parent chart condition flag when included as a subchart. Not used by the chart templates.

k8sName.description: Kubernetes DNS-1035 label: must START WITH A LETTER, then lowercase letters/digits/dashes; cannot start/end with a dash. (Service names derived from these tags require a leading letter.)

instanceTag.title: instanceTag
instanceTag.description: Instance tag (table 50). Required, DNS format lower-case.

clusterTag.title: clusterTag
clusterTag.description: Cluster tag (table 52). Required, DNS format lower-case.

projectTag.title: projectTag
projectTag.description: Project tag. Required, 2..6 characters, DNS format lower-case.

shortToken.description: DNS token 2..6 characters: starts with a letter, then lowercase letters/digits/dashes; no dash at the start/end.

labels.title: Common labels
labels.description: Common labels for all chart resources. Result: metadata.labels.

annotations.title: Common annotations
annotations.description: Common annotations for all chart resources. Result: metadata.annotations.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: true = create AuthorizationPolicy; false = do not create.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: true = create NetworkPolicy; false = do not create.

egress.title: Egress rules
egress.description: List of allowed egress traffic rules. Result: spec.egress of the NetworkPolicy.

ports.title: Port
ports.description: A single destination port and protocol for the egress rule.

ipBlock.title: ipBlock
ipBlock.description: CIDR block for NetworkPolicy. Hidden in the editor UI.

except.title: except
except.description: Exclusions from the CIDR block. Hidden in the editor UI.

matchLabels.title: matchLabels
matchLabels.description: Labels for selecting a pod or namespace.

name.title: name
name.description: Gateway name, 2..6 characters. Used for metadata.name, ConfigMap parametersRef and parentRefs[].gateway references.

enabled.title: enabled
enabled.description: true = create this Gateway and its ConfigMap; false = skip.

ipAddress.title: ipAddress
ipAddress.description: Static LoadBalancer IP address for MetalLB. If set, the template adds metallb.io/loadBalancerIPs to ConfigMap.data.service.metadata.annotations.

listeners.title: Listeners
listeners.description: List of Gateway listeners. Result: spec.listeners.

hpa.title: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
hpa.description: HPA settings for the automatically created Istio Gateway Deployment. Rendered into ConfigMap.data.horizontalPodAutoscaler.

resources.title: Gateway resources
resources.description: Resources for the istio-proxy container in the automatically created Deployment. Rendered into ConfigMap.data.deployment. Hidden in the new order form: created with a default value, edited later from the product card.

enabled.title: enabled
enabled.description: true = create a HorizontalPodAutoscaler for the gateway deployment; false = do not create.

minReplicas.title: minReplicas
minReplicas.description: Minimum number of replicas of the gateway deployment.

maxReplicas.title: maxReplicas
maxReplicas.description: Maximum number of replicas of the gateway deployment.

averageUtilization.title: averageUtilization
averageUtilization.description: Target average CPU utilization in percent.

requests.title: requests
requests.description: Requested resources of the istio-proxy container. For CPU-based HPA it is mandatory to set requests.cpu.

limits.title: limits
limits.description: Resource limits of the istio-proxy container.

protocol.title: protocol
protocol.description: Listener protocol. Allowed values: HTTP, HTTPS, TCP, UDP, TLS.

hostname.title: hostname
hostname.description: Listener domain. Optional for HTTP/TCP/UDP, required for HTTPS/TLS. Hint: if tlsMode=Terminate and the hostname contains *.idp.ecpk.test or *.edp.ecpk.test, the platform predefined wildcard certificate is used; otherwise an empty TLS secret is created that needs to be filled in.

tlsMode.title: tlsMode
tlsMode.description: TLS mode. Passthrough (default) - TLS passes through, no certificate needed. Terminate - TLS is terminated at the Gateway; the Secret name is generated automatically by hostname (idp/edp -> predefined cert; otherwise - an empty *-tls secret to fill in). tlsSecretName does not need to be set.

tlsSecretName.title: tlsSecretName
tlsSecretName.description: Generated automatically by hostname (see tlsMode); not set by the user. Hidden.

certificateRefs.title: certificateRefs
certificateRefs.description: Explicit certificateRefs for tls.certificateRefs. An alternative to tlsSecretName/auto secret.

allowedRoutes.title: allowedRoutes
allowedRoutes.description: Rules for admitting Routes to the listener. Optional field. If not set, the Gateway API applies the default behavior.

namespaces.title: namespaces
namespaces.description: From which namespaces Routes are allowed. Hidden from the user: for now always Same (only the Gateway namespace).

from.title: from
from.description: Same = only the Gateway namespace, All = any namespace, Selector = namespaces by selector.

kinds.title: kinds
kinds.description: Route types allowed to bind to the listener.

name.title: name
name.description: Route name, 2..6 characters. Used for metadata.name.

enabled.title: enabled
enabled.description: true = create Route; false = skip. Hidden: defaults to true, the form does not show this field (the chart creates the Route when enabled is absent).

kind.title: kind
kind.description: Route type. apiVersion will be selected automatically by the template based on kind.

parentRefs.title: parentRefs
parentRefs.description: References to Gateway/listener. gateway may be omitted when there is a single Gateway (substituted automatically).

hostnames.title: hostnames
hostnames.description: Route hostnames (for TLSRoute this is SNI). Hidden: with a single Gateway the chart derives them from the listeners by sectionName. Not supported for TCP/UDP.

rules.title: rules
rules.description: Routing rules. Result: spec.rules of the route resource.

gateway.title: gateway
gateway.description: Gateway name from gateways[].name. Hidden: with a single Gateway the chart substitutes its name automatically.

matches.title: matches
matches.description: List of match conditions for HTTPRoute / GRPCRoute. Do not use for TLSRoute/TCPRoute/UDPRoute.

filters.title: filters
filters.description: Gateway API filters. Supported for HTTPRoute / GRPCRoute.

backendRefs.title: backendRefs
backendRefs.description: List of backend services where traffic will be directed.

routeMatch.title: Match
routeMatch.description: A single match condition for HTTPRoute or GRPCRoute. Choose one type: Path, Headers, QueryParams or Method.

service.title: service
service.description: Full gRPC service name, for example users.UsersService.

method.title: method
method.description: gRPC method name, for example GetUser.

routeFilter.title: filter
routeFilter.description: Gateway API filter for HTTPRoute / GRPCRoute. RequestHeaderModifier, RequestRedirect, URLRewrite and CORS are supported.

requestHeaderModifierFilter.title: RequestHeaderModifier
requestHeaderModifierFilter.description: Modification of request headers. Available methods: Set, Add, Remove.

requestHeaderModifier.title: method
requestHeaderModifier.description: Choose the action on the request header: Set, Add or Remove.

oneOf.title: Set
oneOf.description: Set overwrites the header with the given value.

oneOf.title: Add
oneOf.description: Add appends a value to an existing header.

oneOf.title: Remove
oneOf.description: Remove deletes a header by name.

requestRedirectFilter.title: RequestRedirect
requestRedirectFilter.description: Request redirect. Available methods: Scheme, Domain, FullPath, Port, StatusCode.

requestRedirect.title: method
requestRedirect.description: Choose which part of the redirect will be changed.

path.title: value
path.description: Full replacement of the request path.

urlRewriteFilter.title: URLRewrite
urlRewriteFilter.description: URL rewrite before sending to the backend. Available methods: Domain, FullPath.

urlRewrite.title: method
urlRewrite.description: Choose which part of the URL will be rewritten.

hostname.title: value
hostname.description: Exact domain to rewrite the hostname to.

path.title: value
path.description: Full replacement of the request path.

corsFilter.title: CORS
corsFilter.description: CORS filter for HTTPRoute. Choose one CORS parameter to configure.

allowOrigins.title: value
allowOrigins.description: List of allowed Origins. For example: https://example.ru or *.

allowCredentials.title: value
allowCredentials.description: Always true. Allows credentials in CORS requests.

exposeHeaders.title: value
exposeHeaders.description: List of response headers exposed to client code.

maxAge.title: value
maxAge.description: Preflight response cache time in seconds.

name.title: name
name.description: Backend Service name. Required field. Will not be automatically prefixed with the chart name.

weight.title: weight
weight.description: Backend weight when balancing between multiple backendRefs.
